title: Socodka Lacagta
askPrompt: Falanqee socodka lacagtayda iyo muddada lacagta. Maxaan sameeyaa si aan u horumariyo?
addBalanceCta: Ku dar hadhaaga lacagtaada dejinta si aad u raad-raacdo muddada lacagta
weeklyTitle: Socodka lacagta saafiga ah ee toddobaadlaha ah
aboveBreakeven: Waxaad kasbanaysaa {amount}/maalintii heerka is-dheellitirka ka sarreysa
